data.title: How we built a science club in Patna
challenges: Lack of experimental kits and science laboratories in the school.
actionSteps: Conducted simple physics experiments using plastic bottles and cups.
Arranged weekly science fairs on Saturdays.
data.impact: Students showed high interest and won awards in the block level science competition.
data.blurb: We established a local science club to encourage students to learn through hands-on activities.
data.content: In Patna district, schools were facing shortages of laboratory resources. The teachers created a science club to conduct simple experiments. Students created models of windmills and water filters. The project succeeded in improving science learning outcomes across three local schools.
